# Cyberint (Check Point)

## RSA Conference 2026 Field Intelligence Report: Cyberint (Check Point)

## RSA 2026
- **Booth number and hall:** Check Point, which now includes Cyberint's offerings, is located at Booth #N-5879. This booth is typically in the North Expo Hall of the Moscone Center.
- **Any updated booth info from the conference floor:** At RSA Conference 2026, Check Point is showcasing its newly launched AI Defense Plane with live demonstrations. The booth also features "Gandalf: The LLM-Breaker Challenge" and "Gandalf: The Agent Gauntlet," an experiential showcase exploring attacks on agentic systems. Other live security demos include Hybrid Mesh Security, Secure Workspace, CTEM, and AI Security & GenAI Threat Prevention. Experts are available to discuss multi-cloud complexity, workspace modernization, and AI-driven threats.

## Company Profile
- **Employee count (approximate):** Approximately 160-170 employees.
- **Founded year:** Cyberint was founded in 2009. Some sources also state 2010.
- **HQ location:** Cyberint's headquarters are in Petah Tikva, Israel. They also have offices in Tel Aviv, Israel, and Redwood City, California, U.S. [
